reviews.comment:
Acá Dolores es lo mejor. Espacio cuidado, muy tranquilo. Pet friendly

(Translated by Google)
Dolores is the best here. A well-maintained, quiet space. Pet-friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5dDdDLXBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Punto estratégico para estirar las piernas en la ruta, con buenos protocolos covid en su servicio y una amplia zona verde para descansar, es una lástima que no sepamos cuidar los espacios y la gente deje su basura después de comer...

(Translated by Google)
A strategic spot for stretching your legs on the trail, with proper COVID protocols and a large green area for resting. It's a shame we don't know how to take care of the spaces and people leave their trash after eating...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MTZqdENREAE

reviews.comment:
Internte pedir asistencia al servicio de ACA que estaba estacionado en el lugar. Me pidieron que llame telefonicamente,solicite asistencia y aguarde la derivacion...

(Translated by Google)
I tried to ask for assistance from the ACA service that was parked there. They told me to call, request assistance, and wait to be referred...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bDVtWmNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Esta bien para un parate lo único q me llamo la atención fue q no tenía un minimercado como se acostumbra ver en las estaciones de servicio

(Translated by Google)
It's fine for a stop, the only thing that caught my attention was that it didn't have a mini-market like you usually see at gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NS1DY093EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente pude cargar y pagar con la aplicación!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, I was able to charge and pay with the app!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cDllMEl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los playeros geniales, muy serviciales. El parque muy lindo para disfrutar de su sombra. Podrían mejorar  los baños.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were great and very helpful. The park is lovely and offers plenty of shade. The restrooms could be improved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MjhfUWt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5Ml9QY293RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una empleada nueva iba y venía limpiando cada baño al salir ,no dejaba pasar sino estaba limpio y límite de paz por protocolo.Limpio todo.me sorprendió.

(Translated by Google)
A new employee was going back and forth cleaning each bathroom as people left, not letting anyone in unless it was clean, and following protocol, she kept everything clean. I was surprised.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bTRhckpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo nafta. Hay sanitarios decentes y espacio para estirar las piernas. Hay una máquina de agua caliente gratis pero las cosas del shop son bastante caras.

(Translated by Google)
Only gasoline. There are decent restrooms and legroom. There's a free hot water machine, but the shop items are quite expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eV9qblhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre atienden super amables los playeros

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are always super friendly.
